hero.title: Support ACIKY
hero.subtitle: Your donation drives Kundalini Yoga in Cuba

intro.title: Why donate?
intro.description: We are at a decisive moment. Kundalini Yoga is not a spiritual luxury — it is a profound human need. In times of stress, disconnection, and emotional crisis, Kundalini Yoga offers ancestral tools that transform lives, heal trauma, and elevate consciousness. But to reach more people, we need your help.

uses.title: How will your donation be used?

trainers.title: Teacher Development & Training
trainers.description: Advanced workshops for certified teachers, ongoing training, international certifications, and building a strengthened community of instructors dedicated to service.

festival.title: Festival Faro de Luz
festival.description: Our annual event bringing together instructors and practitioners across Cuba. Teachings from internationally recognized teachers and expanding to more participants every year.

routes.title: Golden Routes
routes.description: Bringing Kundalini Yoga directly to provinces and remote communities in Cuba, reaching populations without access to these teachings.

classes.title: Regular Classes & Programs
classes.description: Accessible classes for the whole community, programs for children, youth, and adults, and safe spaces to learn, grow, and transform.

langar.title: Langar (Sacred Food)
langar.description: Nutritious food for participants at activities and events. An act of love and Karma Yoga — ensuring no one goes without nourishment while practicing.

ceremonies.title: Ceremonies & Special Events
ceremonies.description: Transformative rebirths, deep meditation retreats, and community events that strengthen bonds among practitioners and create spaces for collective healing.

impact.title: The real impact of your donation
impact.i2: Empowering teachers who dedicate their lives to service
impact.i3: Expanding light and consciousness across Cuba
impact.i5: Honoring the sacred technology of Kundalini Yoga

quote.text: The science of reality is to find the sound and resonate in that sound. Then the soul shall prevail and God shall dwell within you.
quote.author: Yogi Bhajan

benefits.title: Benefits for donors
benefits.b1: Public recognition on our website and social media
benefits.b2: Donation certificate for your personal records
benefits.b3: Regular updates on the projects your donation funds
benefits.b4: Special invitation to ACIKY events and ceremonies
benefits.b5: Infinite blessings and gratitude from our entire community
benefits.b6: The knowledge that you are transforming lives

promise.title: Our Promise
promise.description: We will use every peso, every dollar, with absolute transparency, unwavering integrity, and spiritual devotion. Every contribution will go directly to expanding the practice, creating spaces of transformation, and serving the community with selfless love.

paypal.title: Donate via PayPal
paypal.instructions: Click the button to go to the PayPal payment page. Once the payment is complete, come back here and fill out the confirmation form.
paypal.notice: A note about our PayPal account
paypal.noticeText: Due to the financial restrictions we face as a Cuban organization, we are currently unable to hold a PayPal account of our own. For this reason, a teacher who deeply believes in our mission generously allows us to use his personal account to receive international donations on behalf of ACIKY ( You must put exactly: "Donation ACIKY" ). Every cent donated goes entirely to our community. We are deeply grateful for your understanding and your trust.

cup.title: Donate in CUP (bank transfer)
cup.instructions: Make a bank transfer or Transfermóvil to the details below. Then fill out the confirmation form with your transaction reference.

confirm.title: Confirm your donation
confirm.subtitle: After making the payment, fill out this form so we can record your donation.
confirm.name: Full name
confirm.transactionRefHint: PayPal ID or bank transaction number (e.g.: MM6047Q4FA987).
confirm.notesPlaceholder: Would you like to leave a message? (optional)
confirm.successMessage: We have received your confirmation. We will verify the payment and contact you if needed.
confirm.errorRequired: Please fill in the required fields: name, email, and amount.
confirm.errorAmount: The amount must be a number greater than 0.
